name: hangar
title: Hangar
description: Self-hosted fleet control plane — aggregate your git repos across providers, score each against a best-practice policy, and remediate hygiene drift via pull requests

defaultEnv.description: Fernet key that signs your OIDC login session AND encrypts provider credentials (GitHub App private key, tokens) at rest. Required — in SSO (OIDC) mode Hangar is fail-closed and refuses to start without it. Generate one with: python -c 'from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())'
